nasb.text: Do not love sleep, or you will become poor; Open your eyes, and you will be satisfied with food.

esv.text: Love not sleep, lest you come to poverty; open your eyes, and you will have plenty of bread.

cnv.text: 不要貪睡，免得你貧窮； 睜開眼睛，你才有飽餐。

ccb.text: 不要贪睡，免得贫穷； 勤劳工作，粮食丰足。

csbs.text: 不要贪睡，免得你陷入穷困； 要睁开眼睛，你就得以饱食！
